since_last: 16% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.27%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 16% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -2.30% · Gold -0.87% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 16% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.27%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.27%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at -8.23%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.67%, SAP +3.20%, ZBRA +2.04%, NOW +1.44%, MSFT +1.11%. Laggards: MRVL -8.23%, ASML -7.56%, MU -7.43%, SYNA -7.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.75% at $155.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
